# Product Mission

  This file is read by /discovery (Step 0), /benefit-metric (Step 1), and /clarify.
  Fill in all sections before your first /discovery run.
  Keep it updated as the product strategy evolves.
  
  Do not leave placeholders — even a rough one-sentence answer is better than blank.
-->
